canonical_claim: Any investment must be rejected unless the analyst can articulate in plain, first-principles terms how the business generates profit and why its competitive position is intelligible

variant_seeds.claim: An investment may only proceed to analysis if the analyst can explain in plain language how the business makes money, who its customers are, and why those customers will continue to buy
Any investment where the source of competitive advantage cannot be explained through the analyst's lattice of cross-disciplinary frameworks must be classified as unanalyzable and rejected
无法用一句话向外行说清楚公司如何赚钱，则禁止投资该公司

canonical_claim: Industries whose competitive dynamics require forecasting fundamental scientific breakthroughs or frontier technology pathways are out of scope

variant_seeds.claim: 理解其竞争力需要预测底层科学突破或前沿技术路线的行业，不得投资

canonical_claim: The target business must possess an identifiable, structurally self-reinforcing competitive barrier that protects its returns on capital

variant_seeds.claim: A target business must possess an identifiable structural competitive barrier that protects its returns on capital from competitive erosion
Competitive advantage must be structurally self-reinforcing through underlying economic mechanisms

canonical_claim: A structural competitive barrier that is demonstrably narrowing on a secular basis is disqualifying even if currently wide

variant_seeds.claim: A structural competitive barrier that is demonstrably narrowing on a secular basis is a disqualifying condition, even if the barrier currently appears wide

canonical_claim: The ability to raise prices in excess of input cost inflation without meaningful customer attrition is a primary behavioral test of whether a real structural competitive barrier exists

variant_seeds.claim: The ability to raise prices without losing meaningful customer volume is the primary operational litmus test of whether a real structural competitive barrier exists
A business must demonstrate the structural ability to raise prices in excess of input cost increases without meaningful customer attrition as a primary test of franchise quality
结构性竞争壁垒评估中应验证企业是否具备涨价而不流失核心客户的能力

canonical_claim: Sustained high returns on invested capital across a full business cycle are the primary quantitative signature of an operative structural barrier

variant_seeds.claim: Sustained high returns on invested capital over a full business cycle are the primary quantitative signature that a structural competitive barrier is operative

canonical_claim: The target's core brand should occupy the first-choice position in consumer mental association within its category

variant_seeds.claim: 目标企业的核心品牌应在其品类中占据消费者联想的首选位置

canonical_claim: A high-quality business model should continue to operate profitably even under mediocre management

variant_seeds.claim: 好的商业模式在平庸管理者接手后仍应能维持正常盈利运营

canonical_claim: Any verified evidence of management dishonesty, deception, or lack of integrity unconditionally disqualifies the investment

variant_seeds.claim: Management that lacks verifiable integrity is disqualifying regardless of business quality or valuation attractiveness
Any evidence of management dishonesty disqualifies the investment unconditionally
存在欺骗消费者、投资者或合作伙伴的明确历史记录的企业，不得投资

canonical_claim: Management's capital allocation must be oriented to long-term shareholder value, evidenced by retained earnings generating at least equivalent incremental market value rather than serving short-term or self-interested motives

variant_seeds.claim: Management that retains earnings without creating equivalent or greater market value over time is destroying shareholder capital through deficient capital allocation
管理层资本配置决策应以股东长期利益最大化为导向，而非以短期业绩表现或自身利益为导向

canonical_claim: Management evaluation must center on the incentive structure rather than stated character, reputation, or interview impressions

variant_seeds.claim: Management evaluation must center on the incentive structure rather than on stated character, reputation, or interview impressions

canonical_claim: Management that demonstrably resists the institutional imperative — holding excess cash, declining available acquisitions, and defying peer behavior when economics do not justify action — constitutes a positive quality signal

variant_seeds.claim: Management that demonstrably resists the institutional imperative — willing to hold excess cash, decline available acquisitions, and defy peer behavior when economics do not justify action — is a significant positive quality signal

canonical_claim: The business model's structural incentives must align serving customers well with the path to maximum profitability

variant_seeds.claim: The business model's structural incentives must make serving customers well the path to maximum profitability

canonical_claim: Dividends should be paid only when management cannot deploy retained capital at returns exceeding what owners could earn independently

variant_seeds.claim: A company should pay dividends only when it demonstrably cannot deploy retained capital at returns exceeding what owners could earn independently

canonical_claim: A superior business generates cash substantially in excess of what is required to maintain its competitive position

variant_seeds.claim: A superior business generates cash substantially in excess of what is required merely to maintain its competitive position

canonical_claim: The investment entity must not employ conventional borrowed capital, margin, or any leverage mechanism that creates exposure to forced liquidation, margin calls, or fixed maturity

variant_seeds.claim: The investment entity must not use conventional borrowed money that creates exposure to margin calls, fixed maturity dates, or forced liquidation
The investment vehicle must never employ leverage that carries a maturity date, margin requirement, or any mechanism for forced liquidation
投资资金必须全部来自自有资金，禁止使用任何形式的借贷杠杆

canonical_claim: For a high-conviction position, the default state is to hold indefinitely; selling requires affirmative, articulable justification

variant_seeds.claim: Selling a position requires affirmative, articulable justification; the default state for a high-conviction holding is to hold indefinitely

canonical_claim: Price decline alone is not a legitimate sell trigger; only a substantive break in the investment thesis justifies exit

variant_seeds.claim: 价格下跌不构成卖出信号，只有投资论点发生实质性破裂才是合法卖出依据

canonical_claim: A buy decision must be psychologically conditioned on willingness to hold the position even if the market is closed for a long period

variant_seeds.claim: 买入决策应以愿意在市场长期封闭情况下仍能安心持有为心理前提

canonical_claim: Upon recognition of a substantive thesis error, the analyst must immediately exit, regardless of current book loss on the position

variant_seeds.claim: 判断出现实质性错误时应立即认错并退出，不得以当前账面亏损状态为由拖延清仓

canonical_claim: The permanent compounding cost of realizing a capital gain must be explicitly weighed before any sell decision on a position with significant embedded unrealized gains

variant_seeds.claim: The permanent compounding cost of realizing a capital gain must be explicitly weighed before any sell decision on a position with significant embedded unrealized gains

canonical_claim: Business value must be assessed on distributable economic earnings rather than reported accounting earnings

variant_seeds.claim: Business value must be assessed on distributable economic earnings rather than on reported accounting earnings

canonical_claim: An investment requiring a precise multi-year financial model to demonstrate cheapness lacks sufficient valuation buffer; formal DCF models must not serve as the primary source of valuation conviction

variant_seeds.claim: Formal multi-year DCF spreadsheet models must not serve as the primary source of valuation conviction
需要依赖精密财务模型才能得出'便宜'结论的投资机会，不具备足够的估值缓冲

canonical_claim: Full qualitative assessment of business quality, competitive durability, and culture must precede any evaluation of price attractiveness

variant_seeds.claim: Full qualitative assessment of business quality and competitive durability must be completed and confirmed before examining whether the price is attractive
分析流程中，商业模式和企业文化质量的判断必须先于估值评估

canonical_claim: The purchase price must imply an acceptable return even under a materially conservative downside earnings scenario, not only under the base case

variant_seeds.claim: The purchase price must imply an acceptable return even under a materially conservative, downside-case earnings scenario, not only under the base case

canonical_claim: A business with unfavorable long-term structural economics must be rejected regardless of apparent cheapness on near-term financial metrics

variant_seeds.claim: A business with unfavorable long-term structural economics must be rejected regardless of apparent cheapness on near-term financial metrics

canonical_claim: Every investment thesis must undergo explicit reverse reasoning to enumerate plausible failure modes before any positive evaluation begins

variant_seeds.claim: Every investment thesis must undergo explicit reverse reasoning analysis to enumerate plausible failure modes before any positive evaluation begins

canonical_claim: Before finalizing any investment decision, the analyst must explicitly audit the thesis for contamination by the framework's standard psychological bias taxonomy

variant_seeds.claim: Before finalizing any investment decision, the analyst must explicitly audit the thesis for contamination by the framework's standard psychological bias taxonomy

canonical_claim: Market consensus or the investment activity of peers must never be used as positive evidence supporting an investment decision

variant_seeds.claim: Market consensus or the investment activity of peers must never be used as positive evidence supporting an investment decision

canonical_claim: An investment thesis whose validity depends on a specific macroeconomic prediction or on market-timing judgment must not be relied upon as the core decision trigger

variant_seeds.claim: Any investment thesis whose validity is contingent on a specific macroeconomic prediction being correct must be rejected
投资决策不得依赖宏观经济预测或市场短期方向判断作为核心触发依据

canonical_claim: When a bull case depends on multiple independent assumptions holding simultaneously, the combined probability must be explicitly calculated rather than intuitively estimated

variant_seeds.claim: When a bull case requires multiple independent assumptions to simultaneously hold true, the combined probability of success must be explicitly calculated rather than intuitively estimated

canonical_claim: Post-mortem analysis of investment errors must identify the specific reasoning failure in the analyst's own judgment

variant_seeds.claim: Post-mortem analysis of investment errors must identify the specific reasoning failure in the analyst's own judgment

canonical_claim: Every investment opportunity must be evaluated against the explicit opportunity cost of the best alternative deployment of capital available at the time of decision

variant_seeds.claim: Every investment opportunity must be evaluated against the explicit opportunity cost of the best alternative available deployment of capital at the time of decision

canonical_claim: High-conviction investment opportunities are not bound by standard diversification constraints

variant_seeds.claim: 高确信度投资机会不受分散化规则约束
